# ReviewHunts

> ReviewHunts is a software discovery and review platform. Real user reviews, AI-powered insights, side-by-side comparisons, expert buyer guides, and a curated glossary across 100+ SaaS categories.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org) standard to help AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot) find and cite the most useful pages on this site.

- Site: https://reviewhunts.com
- Sitemap: https://reviewhunts.com/sitemap.xml
- License: Content may be cited with attribution to ReviewHunts and a link to the source page.

## Categories

- [Accounting Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/accounting): Manage finances, bookkeeping, and financial reporting
- [AI Image Generators](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-image-generators): Create images and visual content using artificial intelligence
- [AI Chatbots](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-chatbots): Intelligent conversational AI for customer and internal use
- [AI Code Assistants](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-code): AI tools that help developers write, review, and debug code
- [AI Writing Assistants](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-writing): AI-powered tools for content creation, editing, and copywriting
- [Cloud Hosting](https://reviewhunts.com/category/cloud-hosting): Scalable cloud infrastructure and web hosting platforms
- [API Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/api-management): Design, deploy, and monitor APIs across your organization
- [Backup Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/backup): Automated data backup and disaster recovery solutions
- [Contract Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/contract-management): Create, negotiate, and manage contracts digitally
- [Antivirus Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/antivirus): Protect devices from malware, viruses, and cyber threats
- [CI/CD Tools](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ci-cd): Automate software build, test, and deployment pipelines
- [Affiliate Marketing](https://reviewhunts.com/category/affiliate-marketing): Platforms and tools for managing affiliate marketing programs
- [Content Management System](https://reviewhunts.com/category/cms): Create, manage, and publish digital content on websites
- [Analytics & BI](https://reviewhunts.com/category/analytics): Business intelligence and analytics tools
- [Bug Tracking Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/bug-tracking): Track, manage, and resolve software bugs and issues
- [Communication](https://reviewhunts.com/category/communication): Team messaging and video conferencing
- [Business Intelligence](https://reviewhunts.com/category/business-intelligence): Transform data into actionable insights with BI dashboards
- [Collaboration Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/collaboration): Enable team collaboration with shared workspaces and docs
- [Chatbot Platforms](https://reviewhunts.com/category/chatbots): Build AI-powered chatbots for customer service automation
- [Audio Editing](https://reviewhunts.com/category/audio-editing): Professional audio editing and production software
- [Asset Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/asset-management): Digital and physical asset tracking and management solutions
- [Construction Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/construction-management): Project management tools tailored for construction industry
- [Billing & Invoicing](https://reviewhunts.com/category/billing-invoicing): Automated billing, invoicing, and payment collection platforms
- [Content Creation](https://reviewhunts.com/category/content-creation): Tools for creating blog posts, social content, videos, and graphics
- [Apple Apps](https://reviewhunts.com/category/apple-apps): Top-rated applications for macOS, iOS, iPadOS and the Apple ecosystem
- [Commission Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/commission-management): Tools for calculating and managing sales commissions
- [Browser Extensions](https://reviewhunts.com/category/browser-extensions): Extensions for Firefox, Edge, Safari and other web browsers
- [App Development](https://reviewhunts.com/category/app-development): Tools and platforms for building mobile and web applications
- [Church Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/church-management): Software for religious organizations to manage members and events
- [Appointment Scheduling](https://reviewhunts.com/category/appointment-scheduling): Online booking and appointment scheduling software
- [Clinical Trial Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/clinical-trials): Software for managing clinical research and drug trials
- [Conversational AI](https://reviewhunts.com/category/conversational-ai): AI-powered chatbots and virtual assistants for customer engagement
- [Compliance Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/compliance-management): Software for regulatory compliance tracking and reporting
- [Cloud Security](https://reviewhunts.com/category/cloud-security): Security tools for cloud infrastructure and cloud-native applications
- [Board Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/board-management): Software for board meetings, governance, and director collaboration
- [Business Phone Systems](https://reviewhunts.com/category/business-phone): VoIP and cloud-based phone systems for businesses
- [CAD Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/cad-software): Computer-aided design software for engineering and architecture
- [Chrome Extensions](https://reviewhunts.com/category/chrome-extensions): Browser extensions for Google Chrome to enhance productivity, security, and browsing experience
- [Employee Engagement](https://reviewhunts.com/category/employee-engagement): Boost team morale with surveys, recognition, and feedback tools
- [Cybersecurity](https://reviewhunts.com/category/security): Protect your business from threats
- [E-Commerce](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ecommerce): Online store and commerce platforms
- [CRM Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/crm): Customer relationship management tools
- [Electronic Signature](https://reviewhunts.com/category/e-signature): Sign documents digitally with legally binding e-signatures
- [Expense Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/expense-management): Track, approve, and reimburse employee expenses
- [Learning Management System](https://reviewhunts.com/category/lms): Create and deliver online courses and training programs
- [Document Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/document-management): Store, organize, and share documents securely
- [Database Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/database-management): Manage, monitor, and optimize database performance
- [Customer Success Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/customer-success): Reduce churn and improve customer retention with proactive tools
- [Graphic Design Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/graphic-design): Create stunning graphics, illustrations, and visual designs
- [Inventory Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/inventory-management): Track stock levels, orders, and warehouse operations

## Recent Articles

- [Best iGaming Software Providers in 2026: Platforms, Features & How to Choose](https://reviewhunts.com/blog/best-igaming-software-providers): A buyer-focused guide to the top iGaming software providers — casino, sportsbook, and platform vendors compared on licensing, game catalog, integrations, and pricing.
